name: Quality Industrial Corp.
business: Quality Industrial Corp., through its 51%-owned subsidiary Al Shola Gas, provides comprehensive solutions for the liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) industry including consulting, designing, supplying, installing, and maintaining LPG systems, as well as transportation and supply of LPG in bulk and cylinder formats.

exposures.sentence: Through our 51%-owned operating subsidiary, Al Shola Al Modea Gas Distribution L.L.C. ( ASG or Al Shola Gas ), we provide comprehensive solutions for the liquefied petroleum gas ( LPG ) industry.
